interpretation: Finite proof kernel over the executable BEP semantic fragment; these checks are separate from locked fixture labels and do not change the denominator.

obligations.name: csp_policy_meet_nonexpansion
obligations.theorem: Adding an enforced CSP policy cannot authorize a script edge that one enforced member blocks.

obligations.name: csp_meet_commutativity_idempotence
obligations.theorem: Enforced CSP-policy conjunction is commutative and idempotent over the encoded source-list fragment.

obligations.name: csp_source_list_extension_monotonicity
obligations.theorem: Adding a source expression to one source list cannot remove an allowed script edge before policy meet is applied.

obligations.name: csp_directive_specificity
obligations.theorem: Script-element source selection follows script-src-elem, then script-src, then default-src, then the uncovered default.

obligations.name: csp_report_only_monitor_only
obligations.theorem: A report-only CSP surface yields monitoring conflict under an enforcement intent but no enforced block judgment.

obligations.name: cors_credentialed_shareability_table
obligations.theorem: Credentialed CORS shareability is exact-origin plus byte-case-sensitive ACAC, and wildcard excludes credentials.

obligations.name: cors_duplicate_acao_rejection
obligations.theorem: A response with multiple ACAO values is not shareable in the encoded CORS fragment.

obligations.name: cors_dynamic_origin_cache_partition
obligations.theorem: Dynamic ACAO requires an Origin discriminator; unrelated Vary fields do not repair the cache obligation.

obligations.name: cors_vary_origin_tokenization
obligations.theorem: Only an Origin token, not a substring, repairs dynamic ACAO cache partitioning.

obligations.name: hsts_state_transition_partition
obligations.theorem: HSTS processing partitions into insecure-delivery ignore, invalid-header ignore, zero-age clear, and valid-state cases.

obligations.name: hsts_preload_criterion_boundary
obligations.theorem: The documented preload-control predicate is exactly max-age>=31536000 plus includeSubDomains plus preload in the encoded fragment.

obligations.name: coep_cors_mode_separation
obligations.theorem: CORS response headers alone do not repair a no-cors COEP resource edge; compatible CORP repairs the no-cors edge.

obligations.name: coop_coep_isolation_partition
obligations.theorem: Cross-origin isolation preconditions require the encoded COOP/COEP pair and are disabled by an explicit Permissions-Policy denial.

obligations.name: corp_scope_lattice
obligations.theorem: CORP scope is ordered same-origin <= same-site <= cross-origin over the fixture origin approximation.

obligations.name: corp_same_site_consistency
obligations.theorem: CORP same-site delegates exactly to the fixture same-site approximation.

obligations.name: permissions_allowlist_boundary
obligations.theorem: Empty allowlists deny a feature and wildcard/explicit external entries over-allow a denied origin in the encoded fragment.

obligations.name: permissions_feature_independence
obligations.theorem: A Permissions-Policy directive affects only its named feature in the encoded fragment.

obligations.name: ordered_generation_layer_contract
obligations.theorem: Append preserves fields, set replaces same-name fields, and remove deletes same-name fields before semantic evaluation.

obligations.name: ordered_layer_remove_set_absorption
obligations.theorem: A release remove absorbs same-name fields, a release set replaces same-name fields, and unrelated fields are preserved.

obligations.name: known_fragment_totality
obligations.theorem: Known encoded fragments execute without exception under irrelevant context extensions.

obligations.name: header_name_canonicalization_idempotence
obligations.theorem: Header-name canonicalization is idempotent over encoded policy fields.

obligations.name: header_lookup_case_insensitivity
obligations.theorem: Policy header lookup is case-insensitive while preserving values.

obligations.name: csp_source_expression_boundaries
obligations.theorem: Encoded CSP source expressions have exact wildcard, none, self, scheme, host, and subdomain boundaries.

obligations.name: report_only_does_not_weaken_enforced_csp
obligations.theorem: Report-only CSP fields neither enforce nor weaken an enforced CSP field in the encoded script-load fragment.

obligations.name: cors_wildcard_noncredentialed_shareability
obligations.theorem: Wildcard ACAO remains shareable for non-credentialed modeled requests regardless of ACAC noise.

obligations.name: cors_duplicate_acao_order_invariance
obligations.theorem: Duplicate ACAO rejection is invariant to header order.

obligations.name: hsts_parser_case_spacing_boundary
obligations.theorem: The HSTS preload predicate is robust to directive case/spacing and rejects below-threshold age.

obligations.name: corp_cross_origin_top_allows_all
obligations.theorem: CORP cross-origin is the top element of the encoded CORP scope lattice.

obligations.name: permissions_directive_order_commutativity
obligations.theorem: Ordering independent Permissions-Policy directives does not change the queried feature judgment.

obligations.name: unknown_header_noninterference
obligations.theorem: Headers outside the encoded policy vocabulary do not affect known fragment judgments.
